creator: michal.zielonka.8001@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 212476
cad/Slic3r x11-toolkits/p5-Wx

I am a fan of 3d printing and I want to propose new port for slicer which I use regularly. It's original Slic3r from https://github.com/slic3r/Slic3r. I've used it from one year and I have not met any problems with it.
The attachment contains port of Slic3r itself plus some dependencies. Also I had to bring back to life p5Wx.
